tasks.subject: Task 1: Foundation — i18n, error codes, routes, sidebar, guard test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Scaffolding for all three 3c areas: i18n namespaces (admin.upstream/signingKeys/audit + nav labels), 3 error codes, 4 requiresAdmin routes, 3 sidebar items, guard regression test.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/locales/en.ts, components/custom/AppSidebar.vue, router/index.ts; Test router/guard.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/router/guard.test.ts && npx vue-tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/router/guard.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/router/guard.test.ts && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["i18n complete + apostrophe guard clean","sidebar shows 3 new admin items","4 requiresAdmin routes exist","guard test asserts requiresAdmin"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AdminUpstreamIdpsView — list + create
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /admin/upstream-idps lists providers + inline create (sudo, write-only secret, mode select), modeled on AdminOidcClientsView.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.vue (+ export interface UpstreamIdp); Test AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpsView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET list + Table (mode/state badges) + empty state","create posts all fields via withSudo","clientSecret write-only","already_exists inline","success shows created + reload"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView — edit + rotate + delete
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /admin/upstream-idps/:slug edit (PUT, no secret, +disabled), rotate-secret (POST 204, no reveal), delete (ConfirmDialog→POST), modeled on AdminOidcClientDetailView.

**Files:** Create AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue; Test AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminUpstreamIdpDetailView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["not-found + visible load-error","PUT all fields incl disabled, no clientSecret","rotate POST 204 no reveal","delete navigates to list"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: AdminSigningKeysView — list + lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /admin/signing-keys list (status badges + timestamps + expandable publicJwk) + generate/activate/retire, each sudo-gated behind ConfirmDialog, actions status-gated.

**Files:** Create AdminSigningKeysView.vue; Test AdminSigningKeysView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminSigningKeysView.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminSigningKeysView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminSigningKeysView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminSigningKeysView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list status badges pending/active/decommissioning/retired","generate POST no body via withSudo+confirm","activate gated to pending, retire gated to decommissioning","active_key_no_replacement surfaced","expandable publicJwk"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AdminAuditView — filters + load-more + expandable detail
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /admin/audit newest-first table, filters (factor/event/accountId/since/until), keyset load-more (before=lastId), per-row expandable pretty-JSON detail.

**Files:** Create AdminAuditView.vue; Test AdminAuditView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminAuditView.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminAuditView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminAuditView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/AdminAuditView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["initial GET limit=50 newest-first","filters Apply re-queries from top; Clear empties","load-more before=lastId appends; hidden when <limit","row expands to pretty JSON detail + userAgent","empty state"]}
```
